title: Breed Classifier Training Notebook Plan

pipeline.goal: Reject unsuitable photos before visual comparison.
Detect side body, front body, head profile, head front or unsuitable images.
Classify Cane Corso vs similar and negative dog classes.
Compare the image embedding to a curated Cane Corso reference set.
Combine photo quality, breed classifier, similarity and geometry signals into an explainable visual match score.

first_prototype_approach: Use transfer learning and keep the model as an experiment until a reviewed image dataset exists.
